channel.title: 交易系统 on William Fang
channel.description: Recent content in 交易系统 on William Fang

item.title: CTP低延时交易系统研究笔记
item.description: 参考链接 知乎 高频交易实盘中，如何提高按对价(bid-ask)执行限价单(limit order)的成交率？

item.title: 低延时(ULL)交易系统开发框架
item.description: ULL (ULTRA LOW LATENCY) ARCHITECTURES FOR ELECTRONIC TRADING ULL (Ultra Low Latency) Architectures for Electronic Trading *NYU SPS – Online, Adjunct Instructor: Ted Hruzd* FALL 2019 GLOBAL ON-LINE SEP 18 – NOV7 8 weeks with 4 modules, 5 assignments 90 minute optional weekly Google hangout sessions plus collaboration with WhatsApp with my responses within 24 hours On-Line Registration – https://www.sps.nyu.edu/professional-pathways/topics/finance/asset-management-and-investment-strategies/FINA1-CE9515-ull-ultra-low-latency-architectures-for-electronic-trading.html *** All course content will be online by Sep 16

item.title: CentOS 调用显示器
item.description: 参考链接：Stack OverFlow 在系统添加显示屏 export DISPLAY=:0.0 xhost +HOSTNAME xhost +local:root 在交易系统调用屏幕 import os os.putenv('DISPLAY', ':0.0')
